scope.summary: Make the installer next-step discovery command truthful for non-interactive callers and reject non-Bash interpreters before Bash-only options are parsed.
out_of_scope: Changing discovery consent semantics or performing installer network, package, service, or filesystem mutations.

entry_points.name: non-interactive installer next steps
entry_points.trace: print_next_steps now prints the existing setup --discover command together with the exact required non-interactive consent flags: --discover-tns or --yes.

entry_points.name: dash install.sh
entry_points.trace: The POSIX-compatible preflight exits 2 with 'run with bash' before set -o pipefail. The installer lint gate executes that diagnostic when dash is available.

limitations: Scoped shell checks only: bash -n install.sh; bash -n crates/oraclemcp/install.sh; bash -n scripts/installer_lint_and_offline_smoke.sh; cmp -s install.sh crates/oraclemcp/install.sh; git diff --check; and env -u BASH_VERSION dash install.sh --dry-run (exit 2 with the clear Bash instruction).

The full installer lint/offline smoke suite and the full workspace gate were not run for this close because this swarm turn uses scoped checks and the installer suite performs broad temporary-file lifecycle work.
